input_tensors.name: input_ids
input_tensors._note: value_range pinned to [2,3] (half-open -> constant eos_token_id=2). BartForSequenceClassification pools the encoder hidden state at the LAST eos position via input_ids.eq(eos_token_id).nonzero()[-1]; the default random dummy input contains no eos ~98% of the time at seq_len=1024, which makes that index throw 'index -1 is out of bounds for dimension 1 with size 0' during export. Forcing every token to eos guarantees the pooling index is valid. Real inference is unaffected (this only shapes the export-time dummy).
